context.role: default resting state of Echo the cockatiel
context.usage_scenario: displayed when no other state is active, most frequently seen state

visual_specification.shape: cockatiel silhouette with upright posture, standing on perch
visual_specification.texture: pixel art with minimal dithering, hand-drawn organic feel
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on key features only

animation.description: F1: eyes open, F2: eyes open (slight body shift), F3: eyes closed (blink), F4: eyes open

visual_specification.details: crest in normal position (not raised), cheek patch always visible (#FF004D), tail feathers pointing down, feet gripping perch, subtle breathing motion

relationships.shared_with: all Echo states share same base body structure and color palette
relationships.differences_from: other states have different poses, expressions, and particle effects; idle is the neutral baseline

explicit_negations: no motion blur or tweening between frames
crest must not be raised (that's for happy/singing states)
